category_sources: Official LDPL website describes it as a general-purpose compiled programming language.
source_facts.description says LDPL is a COBOL-like programming language that compiles to C++.
display_name_sources: Official website title is The LDPL Programming Language.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README says the documentation is available at docs.ldpl-lang.org and in the repository docs folder.
Official LDPL website links to docs.ldpl-lang.org as the full documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/Lartu/ldpl, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository topics include programming-language, compiler, cobol, systems-language, and compiled.
source_facts.description identifies a COBOL-like language compiling to C++.
